OpenClaw setup: quick answer

Install OpenClaw, configure channel tokens securely, start gateway, complete pairing, and run an end-to-end message test before opening access to a wider team.

Use a preflight checklist, keep allowlists explicit, and validate one integration at a time. Start with these guides: Setup Checklist, Discord Fixes, and Reliable Scheduled Workflows.

FAQ

AtlasLionClaw helps operators deploy and troubleshoot OpenClaw with production-minded checklists, hardening guidance, and repeatable workflow patterns.

Yes. The free guide covers first deployment basics and top failure fixes. The paid playbook goes deeper on hardening and multi-person operations.

Start with the OpenClaw Setup Checklist, then continue with Security Hardening and Telegram vs Discord for architecture decisions.
